hero.title: A quieter expression of Napa Valley.
hero.body: Crimson & Cardinal is an Oakville-shaped Cabernet Sauvignon made with restraint, structure, and a collector's sense of timing.

metrics.sectionBody: Each release remains intentionally limited, allowing careful handling from vineyard to bottle.

product.title: Crimson & Cardinal Red Wine
product.subtitle: 2021 Oakville, Napa Valley
product.body: Dark fruit, fine oak, polished tannins, and a long, composed finish define this limited Napa Valley release.

provenance.title: From Oakville, with intention.
provenance.body: At the heart of Napa Valley, Oakville gives the wine its depth, structure, and quiet authority. Crimson & Cardinal draws on that character while keeping the style measured and composed.

winemaking.title: Made with patience in the cellar.
winemaking.body: Gentle handling and extended French oak aging preserve texture, length, and balance without excess.
points: Built for both early enjoyment and cellaring

newsletter.title: Stay close to the next release.
newsletter.body: Receive release updates, allocation news, and occasional notes from the cellar.

inquiry.title: Send an Inquiry
inquiry.body: Interested in acquiring Crimson & Cardinal? Leave your details and we will get back to you.

footer.address: Oakville Cross Road, Oakville, CA 94562 USA
